title: PrivacyLock
description: Locks msg, or private messages from being shown in console
body:
**
PrivacyLock: Secure Communication for Your Minecraft Server**

PrivacyLock is a lightweight yet powerful plugin designed to enhance privacy and security on your Minecraft server by preventing private messages from appearing in server console logs. When players use commands like /whisper, /msg, or /tell, the default behavior exposes these private conversations in the console, potentially compromising player privacy.

**Key Features**

🔒 **Enhanced Privacy Protection**


Completely hides sensitive commands from console logs

Works with all standard messaging commands: /msg, /whisper, /tell, /w, /r, /reply

Customizable command list - add any command you want to protect

⚙️** Flexible Configuration**

Easy setup with minimal configuration required

Fully customizable blocked command list

Permission-based bypass system for staff members

Optional admin notifications when protected commands are used

🛡️ **Security-First Approach**

Maintains server security while protecting player privacy

Optional logging system for administrative oversight

Permission-based notification system for staff monitoring

💬 **Seamless User Experience**

No change to gameplay or command behavior for players

Commands function identically - only the logging changes

No performance impact on your server
**
Why Choose PrivacyLock?**

In today's Minecraft servers, player privacy has become increasingly important. Server operators need to balance monitoring for inappropriate behavior while respecting legitimate private conversations. This plugin provides the perfect middle ground - it allows private messaging to remain truly private, while still enabling optional administrative oversight through configurable logging options.

PrivacyLock solves a common issue that many server owners face: how to protect player privacy while maintaining server security. Rather than displaying sensitive messages in console logs that might be viewed by multiple staff members or logged to files, this plugin ensures private communications remain private.

**Installation & Setup**

Download the plugin JAR file and place it in your server's plugins folder

Restart your server or use /reload (full restart recommended)

Configure the plugin by editing the config.yml file

Use /privacylock reload to apply changes

The default configuration works out-of-the-box for most servers, blocking common messaging commands from console display.

**Permissions**

privacylock.admin - Access to plugin commands and configuration

privacylock.bypass - Commands from users with this permission will show in console

privacylock.notify - Receive notifications when protected commands are used

PrivacyLock is perfect for survival servers, roleplay communities, or any Minecraft server where player privacy matters. Give your players the confidence that their private conversations stay private!
